name: Natural Roll
preceding_figure_names: Back Rocks, Closed Rocks (to R and L) (SAMBA), Corta Jaca, Criss Cross Bota Fogos (Shadow Bota Fogos), Maypole (Continuous Volta Spot Turn to R and L) (SAMBA), Natural Basic Movement, Open Rocks (to R and L) (SAMBA), Plait, Progressive Basic Movement, Reverse Basic Movement, Samba Walk: Stationary, Side Basic Movement, Whisk To Left
following_figure_names: Promenade And Counter Promenade Runs, Corta Jaca, Back Rocks (after 1-3 of Natural Roll), Plait (after 1-3 of Natural Roll), Open Rocks (to R and L) (SAMBA), Closed Rocks (to R and L) (SAMBA), Whisk To Right, Natural Basic Movement, Side Basic Movement, Progressive Basic Movement
notes:
Natural Roll may start and finish in various alignments, depending on previous figure.
Less turn may be made (minimum 1/2 over steps 1-6)
The figure is danced in Contact Position, so the arms are held a little higher than normal.
Head follows the line of the spine.

steps.action: LF to side, leaning slightly R
Close RF to LF, preparing to lean fwd

comments: Knees are slightly straighter during steps 4-6

steps.action: RF to side, leaning slightly L
Close LF to RF, preparing to lean back | Body completes turn
